products.c:
INFORMATIVE PAYMENTS DEMO CERTIFICATION PROCESS
Audience: Regional Sales Managers (RSMs) Only
Goal: Certify every RSM to confidently deliver a consistent, value-driven Informativ Payments demo using the approved structure, messaging, and objection handling.
Outcome: Pass/Fail certification tracked internally.
STEP 1: KENT RECORDS THE GOLD-STANDARD DEMO - Complete
Owner: Kent
Content: Full demo of Informativ Payments including:
Brief positioning statement
Product walkthrough
Key features (card vaulting, compliance, speed to funding)
Clear value propositions
Call to action
Deliverables:
Loom video link of Kent’s live demo
Click-through sales deck used during the presentation
STEP 2: DISTRIBUTE DEMO MATERIALS TO RSM TEAM – IN PROGRESS
Owner: Sales Leadership
Deliverables to be shared with team:
Link to Kent’s recorded demo
Click-through deck
Word tracks script (hosted on Engage or Google Doc)
Instructions to RSMs:
Watch the full demo
Review the deck and word tracks
Practice multiple times (self-recording or peer-to-peer sessions)
STEP 3: WORD TRACK PRACTICE
Resource: Sales script/word track doc
Expectations:
Internalize the sales flow and language
Practice responses to dealer objections
Optional: Roleplay with a peer for feedback
STEP 4: SCHEDULE CERTIFICATION DEMO
Action: Each RSM schedules a live mock demo session with:
Sales Director
Ask Chuck (optional observer/facilitator)
Kent
Format: Zoom or in-person
Time Allotted: 30 minutes
Scenario: Deliver the demo as if presenting to a prospective dealer, including common objection handling and a close
STEP 5: DEMO DELIVERY AND EVALUATION
Live Evaluation Includes:
Full walkthrough of Informativ Payments
Real-time feedback on presentation style and content
Soft objections introduced by leadership during the roleplay
STEP 6: SCORECARD + FEEDBACK – SCORECARD COMPLETE
Certification Result: Pass or Fail
Tracking: Certification outcomes stored in a shared tracker or CRM custom field
RSMs who do not pass will receive targeted coaching and must re-certify within 3 business days
CERTIFICATION SCORECARD (LIVE DEMO)
Final Result: Pass / Fail
Evaluator: [Name]
Date: [MM/DD/YYYY]
FEEDBACK LOOP
Post-certification, note and collect:
Common dealer objections
Gaps in understanding or delivery
Suggestions for updating word tracks or demos
Sales Enablement and Kent will use this feedback to refine demo materials over time.

VantageScore : Empower Your Sales Process
®
with a Fast, Reliable Credit Assessment
VantageScore® is a widely accepted credit scoring model developed by Equifax, Experian, and
TransUnion. It’s used by top auto lenders nationwide and uses advanced analytics to generate
scores from 300 to 850. VantageScore delivers reliable insights with fewer barriers. It gives your
team a simple, fast, and compliant way to assess creditworthiness—right from the showroom
floor.
Dealer Advantages
No SSN Required for Prequal - Reduces
friction and speeds up the process.
Soft Pull Based - Non-invasive and
compliant—won’t impact the consumer’s
credit score.
Real-Time Results - Know buyer potential
immediately.
Higher Conversion Rates - Qualify more
buyers earlier in the process.
Seamless Showroom Integration - One tap
in Informativ’s mobile app or Digital
Showroom, and the score is delivered
instantly.
Why Top-Tier & Regional Auto Lenders
Trust VantageScore:
Inclusive Scoring: Scores consumers
with as little as one month of credit
history.
Consistent Across Bureaus: A single
model used by all three bureaus.
Faster Loan Decisions: Helps prequalify
more buyers, sooner.
Over 2,600 lenders use VantageScore,
including banks, credit unions, and captive
finance arms.
800.448.0183 hello@informativ.com informativ.com

competitive.s: Special Offer for NCC Customer - Informativ's Flat Rate Tota
competitive.c:
MAKE THE SWITCH
Now's the time to make the switch from NCC & get all credit reports
(soft & hard pulls) for ONE FLAT RATE.
Our Total Solution includes the industry's only proactive and enforceable sales
compliance platform that:
Complements your current process
Removes paper with PII from your showroom
Stores dead deals for 5 years
Includes all soft and hard pull credit reports and supporting compliance
Gets more verified, prequalified, and compliant leads
Protects your dealership from devastating fines
FEATURED IN
“
Our sales team says to me — it’s
streamlined the process, they’re
happy they have it, and please
don’t take it away.”
Galpin Motors
ABOUT INFORMATIV
Informativ is the top credit, compliance, and customer insights technology company that offers credit reporting, fraud
prevention, compliance solutions, and data enrichment to the automotive and general consumer finance industries across the
United States. Informativ's (previously Dealer Safeguard Solutions, Credit Bureau Connection & CreditDriver) products and
solutions place a heavy emphasis on compliance and identity verification to support the credit application and credit report
process. Learn more at informativ.com.
800.448.0183 hello@informativ.com informativ.com

• OEM-level reporting automation
AI can generate compliance and operational reports required by OEMs—strengthening
Informativ's strategic value.
Outcome:
AI makes Informativ the easiest platform for enterprise groups to scale across dozens of
rooftops, reducing the risk of being replaced after acquisitions.
⸻
4. AI-Native Competitors & Fintech Disruption
How AI can mitigate this threat:
• Build AI-driven fraud scoring, payment intelligence, and compliance
automation
Matching or surpassing new entrants on innovation helps Informativ stay competitive.
• Continuous product improvement from usage data
ML models can detect adoption gaps and automated feature recommendations.
• AI-powered dealer coaching & in-platform guidance
Helps differentiate Informativ with proactive support built directly into the platform.
Outcome:
By building AI natively into the platform, Informativ shifts from reactive to innovation
leader.
⸻
5. Technical Talent Scarcity
How AI can mitigate this threat:
• AI-assisted development (accelerated engineering velocity)
Code generation, automated testing, and documentation can reduce dependency on
scarce engineering talent.
• AI-driven data pipeline validation
Automated cleansing, reconciliation, and anomaly detection reduce the need for data-
engineering headcount.
• AI-enabled support automation
Lowers the burden on support and implementation teams, allowing technical staff to
focus on high-value initiatives.
Outcome:
AI fills gaps created by talent shortages and accelerates product delivery despite limited
resources.
Nicole Grabos Rising Credit Bureau Costs

AI optimization models that recommend the most efficient bureau-pull workflows
Automated pull-reduction rules, stopping unnecessary or duplicate pulls
Predictive analytics to reduce credit waste by forecasting deal success likelihood
Informativ can position itself as the dealer's cost-savings engine.

CoPilot

Discovery Notes: Recap for Tech
Demo-key points, why are they
talking to us?

Battle Card: Cross-Sell / Upsell Opportunity
Customer Profile & Needs
Existing Informativ client on lower tier (Foundation or Detect)
Stable usage, open to improving efficiency or compliance
May not realize what higher tiers unlock
Upgrade Targets:
From FOUNDATION → DETECT or PROTECT
From DETECT → PROTECT or CONTROL
From PROTECT → CONTROL
💡 Key Product Benefits by Move
Value Messaging
“You’re already seeing the value of Informativ—upgrading unlocks automation, insight, and efficiency that pays off in faster deals, fewer chargebacks, and stronger compliance.”
Objection Handling Prompts

Upgrade Path | Key Benefit
Foundation → Detect | Add compliance & basic fraud protection
Detect → Protect | Automate fraud alerts, enforce process steps, go paperless
Protect → Control | Optimize spend, speed up deal desk, gain customer insights


Objection | Response
“We’re good with what we have.” | That’s great—and this upgrade is about unlocking time and increasing sales. Let’s test it with one rooftop.
“Seems like overkill.” | You already pay for credit—what if your spend worked harder? CONTROL gives you ROI on every pull.

Battle Card: Dealerships That Just Want Credit
Customer Profile & Needs
Typically 1 rooftop, limited F&I team
Price-sensitive and process-light
Needs credit access with minimal complexity
Recommended Tier: FOUNDATION
Tagline: Credit Reports Wherever You Need Them
Ideal for credit-only users who want reliable performance without compliance extras.
Key Product Benefits
Flat-Rate Credit Pricing
Refillable Credit Bank
Website Application (Prequal/Full App)
Credit Pull from RouteOne, DealerTrack, etc.
Value Messaging
“FOUNDATION gives you simple, dependable access to credit reports from the platforms you already use—with no surprises and no extras you don’t need.”
Objection Handling Prompts
Competitive Differentiation

Objection | Response
“We’re small—we don’t need all that compliance stuff.” | Exactly. FOUNDATION delivers just the credit access you need, at a price that makes sense.
“We only use RouteOne.” | Perfect—FOUNDATION supports that integration natively. Pull credit without changing a thing.


Informativ FOUNDATION | Experian/Equifax Direct
Flat-rate with refillable bank | Per-pull fees
Integration into RouteOne & DealerTrack | May require third-party bridge
Built-in prequal web app | Often unavailable

Battle Card: Small Franchise Dealer
Customer Profile & Needs
1–2 rooftops, often with fewer than 10 sales staff
Moderate credit volume, heavy reliance on salespeople
Needs compliance guardrails without complexity
Recommended Tier: DETECT
Tagline: Credit Reports with Essential Compliance & Fraud Protection
Affordable and simple—DETECT combines compliant credit access with built-in fraud prevention.
Key Product Benefits
Red Flags Hard Stop and OFAC Screening
Fraud Detection for Credit Pulls
Soft Pull/Hard Pull Flexibility
Integrated Website Application
Value Messaging
“DETECT is your easy button for compliance. Meet regulatory requirements, cut off fraud before it starts, and keep your sales team focused on selling—not paperwork.”
Objection Handling Prompts
Competitive Differentiation

Objection | Response
“We don’t have a compliance issue.” | That’s great—DETECT keeps it that way. Fraud prevention and automated alerts mean peace of mind without changing your sales process.
“We only pull a few reports a day.” | Then let’s make every pull safe and compliant—DETECT protects even the smallest deal.


Informativ DETECT | Basic Bureau Tools
Built-in fraud detection | None or optional
Compliance features included | Add-ons or manual
Flat-rate pricing | Per-pull pricing fluctuations

value_selling.s: Battle Card Med Franchise or Large Indy
value_selling.c:
Battle Card: Medium Franchise Dealer or Large Independent
Customer Profile & Needs
Typically 2–5 rooftops
Growing digital retail presence
Wants better fraud protection and a more consistent sales process
Struggles with inconsistent compliance execution
Recommended Tier: PROTECT
Tagline: Enhanced Compliance & Showroom Guardrails
This tier delivers advanced fraud detection, digital deal jacket creation, and enforceable workflows—ideal for dealers growing their compliance infrastructure.
Key Product Benefits
Digital Deal Jacket & 5-Year Dead Deal Storage
E-Signature & Paperless Sales Process
Real-Time Fraud Alerts on in-store and remote deals
Enforceable Workflows for consistent, defendable compliance
Integration with RouteOne, DealerTrack, DMS, and Inventory Tools
Value Messaging
“PROTECT automates compliance at the desk, ensuring every salesperson follows your process every time—whether it’s Tuesday morning or Saturday madness. Gain control, reduce liability, and protect every deal.”
Objection Handling Prompts
Competitive Differentiation

Objection | Response
“We already train on compliance.” | Training fades—PROTECT enforces. Real-time alerts, automated document capture, and hard stops prevent human error.
“We’re not big enough for all this.” | PROTECT is modular. Use what you need now, grow into the rest. It’s ideal for mid-size operations on the rise.


Informativ PROTECT | 700Credit/NCC
Enforceable compliance automation | Manual SOP enforcement
Full document digitization | Partial or no digital jacket storage
Real-time fraud + identity alerts | Delayed or limited alerts

# Informativ Quote Confidence Checklist (Tiered Packages)

Use this checklist before finalizing any quote. Ensure you're aligning value with buyer pain, selecting the correct tier, and preparing the deal for smooth close and post-sale success.

## 1. Customer Discovery Alignment

☐ Discovery notes confirm correct tier (Foundation, Control, Streamline, Accelerate)
☐ Customer pain points are well-documented (fraud, compliance, speed, funding delays)
☐ Buyer persona is identified (GM, F&I, Desk, Compliance Officer)
☐ Competitive options were surfaced and value-differentiated

## 2. Tier Fit & Value Match

☐ Selected package matches the business pain — no tier over/under-selling
☐ Tier features were reviewed and explained using Battle Cards or Proposal Slides
☐ Customer acknowledged understanding of what’s included and not included
☐ Tier aligns with buyer type (e.g., Accelerate for enterprise/multi-rooftop)

## 3. Objections & Pricing Strategy

☐ Any discount was justified with a value-based tradeoff (e.g., fewer STIPs, limited soft pulls)
☐ Buyer agreed to token expectations or monthly pricing structure
☐ Rebuttals were documented using the Objection Handling Playbook
☐ No unnecessary downgrading occurred to “close quickly”

## 4. Proposal & CPQ Accuracy

☐ Correct SKUs selected for tier in CPQ
☐ Pricing tiers and volume levels match CPQ configuration
☐ All proposal slides or inserts tailored to selected tier are attached
☐ Deal is approved if discount > approved threshold

## 5. Internal Handoff Ready

☐ CS/Implementation has access to all relevant tier details and pain points
☐ Sales has recorded post-sale expectations (e.g., income verification, STIPs)
☐ Customer understands next steps tied to their tier (e.g., Accelerate training or dashboard access)

objections.s: Sales Negotiation Guide PLUS ADD INS
objections.c:
Persona | Motivations | Price Sensitivity | Buying Behavior
Dealer Principal / GM / CEO | Maximize profitability, reduce liability, safeguard brand | High on commoditized items; negotiates emotionally | Prefers transparency, avoids vendor overload, resists change
CFO / Comptroller / Controller | Financial oversight, risk mitigation, cost control | Very High; expects itemized justification | Needs detailed pricing and ROI proof, dislikes vague “bundles”
COO | Process consistency, rollout simplicity, standardization | Moderate; values quality for strategic fit | Informed, operationally focused, strategic, SME in implementation


Objection | Response
“This feels expensive.” | “Compared to what you’d pay in legal exposure, or time lost due to compliance errors, this is a safeguard—not a splurge.”
“Can we do a pilot before committing?” | “We offer flexible monthly terms to prove the value without locking you in. You’ll see ROI by deal jacket count alone.”
“We already have a tool for that.” | “And we often replace 2–3 tools with one platform. Let’s map your stack together to identify overlap.”


Objection | Response
“Need to see cost breakdown.” | “Absolutely. I’ll provide a line-item quote showing soft pull volume, per-store compliance cost, and bundled savings.”
“Is this a fixed or variable cost?” | “We offer fixed-rate and usage-based models. You can choose what aligns best with your forecast.”
“We already budgeted with current vendors.” | “Let’s model a transition timeline—many of our partners recoup switching costs in 30–60 days through reduced risk and labor savings.”


Objection | Response
“How disruptive is implementation?” | “It’s plug-and-play with your DMS and CRM. Minimal lift for store managers. We’ve done this at 1-rooftop independents and 40-store groups.”
“Is this scalable across rooftops?” | “Yes—and our dashboard lets you monitor compliance activity group-wide in real time.”
“We’re mid-rollout with another vendor.” | “Happy to collaborate. We’ve replaced other systems mid-rollout with no data loss or operational downtime.”


Tactic | When to Use | How to Frame
Bundled Discount | Mult rooftop or multi-product deal | “Let’s bundle compliance, credit, and CRM feeds to reduce your effective cost by X%.”
Pilot-to-Full Model | Hesitant buyer, mid-year budget | “Start with 1–2 rooftops on a 60-day test and scale once results validate.”
Risk Aversion Close | Post-FTC scare or audit | “Let’s prevent one lawsuit or fine from derailing your year.”
Cost Justification Worksheet | CFO-led deals | “Let’s walk through a deal-by-deal cost-saving analysis with soft pulls, time savings, and liability exposure.”

Use Case: Final-stage deal strategy, objection handling, closing

Q4 - What are the RSM thresholds?
Answer: This is outlined in the Folder Discounts and Approvals. Additionally, there is the new Deal Desk Form and SOP.  Per MB, we are still working through his approval Vs when to deal desk TBD.
Q5 – What is sales leadership threshold?
Decision: TBD in conjunction with Q3.

social_proof.s: Video Testimonial #1: Autobahn BMW's Fraud Solution is Infor
social_proof.c:
VIDEO TESTIMONIAL: Autobahn BMW's Fraud Solution is Informativ
Speaker: Brandon Lee, New Car Sales Director
Company: Autobahn BMW
Location: Fort Worth, Texas
[Watch the Video](https://informativ.com/case-studies/autobahn-bmws-fraud-solution-is-informativ/)
Topics: Fraud Prevention & ID Scanning, Synthetic Fraud Detection, Driver's License Scanning, Easy to Use, Sales Team Adoption

Transcript:
"I didn't know what synthetic fraud was until eighteen months ago. And we had some clients come in, and we had two one hundred thousand dollar cars stolen within sixty days. And everything passed. When I say everything, red flags passed, OFAC passed, credit passed, not only with the dealer at our level, but also with our BMW Financial Services. The contract funded, cars were gone. And we didn't know anything was going on until we got a phone call from BMW Financial to let us know that the payments hadn't been made. The solution for us was obviously Informativ. If you take their app, which their app is incredible, it's very user-friendly, very simple to use, which you get buy-in from your client advisors, your salespeople, whenever it's easy to use. But literally, instantly, once they take a capture of a picture of a driver's license, front and back copy, and the insurance card, me as a manager can see whether or not they're fraud right then."

And you want to slow that process down, and it's extremely important so that you don't get sloppy or skip steps, right? With Informativ, we're doing it the right way every time. And it's really critical to us with 40 locations and 1,500 employees to have that process that we can manage, watch, and audit, and make sure that it's happening over and over again."

case_studies.s: Case Study - Cavender Auto Family prevents fraud, enforces c
case_studies.c:
informativ.com
CASE STUDY
Cavender Auto Family prevents fraud, enforces compliance
and cuts costs with Informativ’s Total Solution.
Cavender Auto Family has 17 dealerships across Texas and Oklahoma. The third-generation family-run
dealership has enjoyed 80+ years of success by focusing on the people they help not the products they sell.
CHALLENGE
Ensuring consistency and controlling costs was difficult across 17 dealerships. Additionally, with the
increasing threat of fraud and added compliance requirements of the FTC Safeguards Rule, the Cavender
team knew they needed a technology partner to help them achieve their goals, protect their customers’
information, and their dealerships.
SOLUTION
Cavender Auto Family partnered with Informativ for the Total Solution to enforce compliance, prevent
fraud, and control costs.
Compliance Made Easy
Informativ’s compliance technology removes paperwork from the showroom and collects, creates, and stores all
customer information digitally. The technology creates guardrails for the sales team which proactively enforces
compliant deals. It also controls access to customer information and the ability to change any data.
“The full suite of solutions that Informativ provides is great. We were disjointed before and now that it's all
under one umbrella it’s easier for the stores to manage, easier for us from an audit perspective to dial in what's
happening. Having everything from the mobile scanning of the driver's license and doing all the documents
digitally — signing them and pushing them over to the deal jacket — is awesome.”
Ben Stillwagon, Director of IT
Cavender Auto Family
The ONLY Complete & Proactive Credit,
Compliance & Customer Insights Solution 800.448.0183 | info@informativ.com

informativ.com
Fraud Prevention That Works
Informativ’s fraud prevention technology includes multiple verifications and validations throughout the sales process,
but always begins before the sales team spends time working a deal. Whether in-person or remote, Informativ’s fraud
technology scans a customer’s driver’s license verifying the data within the ID’s barcode as well as the information on the
license.
“The driver’s license validation piece has really saved us a few times,” said Ben Stillwagon, Director of IT at Cavender.
“One example is a couple at one of our stores in West Texas was trying to steal two G-wagons. Those are very expensive,
$200,000 cars. The driver’s license came back fraudulent! We kept them there as we worked through everything with
law enforcement, and they showed up and took them away in handcuffs. So, it was really a success story – and we’ve
seen that several times!”
Soft Pulls Save Time
The Total Solution enabled Cavender Auto Family to save time by understanding if the buyer is good upfront through a
soft pull prequalification. Informativ’s soft pulls include the same information as a hard pull but don’t harm the
customer’s credit and don’t have the same compliance obligations as a hard pull. Cavende
